## Summary

What does this PR do, and why?

## Related issue

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (this project uses TDD — the failing test is written first)
- [ ] Lint passes
- [ ] i18n keys added via `pnpm i18n:extract` (if UI strings changed)
- [ ] No monetary values use floats (money is int64 minor units)
- [ ] Follows CONTRIBUTING.md and the minimum-diff principle
- [ ] PR is focused and small

## How tested

Describe how you verified the change.

## Screenshots

For UI changes, include before/after screenshots.
